title: Withered Foxy Jumpscare
description: This datapack will add a 1/10000 chance to appear a jumpscare
body:
# description
Every second, you have a 1/10,000 chance to get **jumpscared** by **Withered Foxy** from **FNaF 2**.

The chance value is customizable (can be global or per-player).

The default config is 1/10,000, per-player

## multiplayer
In multiplayer, each player rolls their own independent chance, so jumpscares are individual. You can enable **Global Jumpscare** in the config.

This datapack/mod is server-side only, which means it won’t work unless you are the host.


## dependencies
**The resource pack is required.**

The mod version already includes the resource pack.
